properties.name: youtube.api.url
properties.description: Base URL for YouTube Data API v3 playlistItems endpoint

properties.name: youtube.api.part
properties.description: Specifies the resource parts to include in the API response (e.g. snippet)

properties.name: youtube.max-results
properties.description: Maximum number of results returned per API request (max 50)

properties.name: youtube.api.key
properties.description: API key used to authenticate requests to YouTube Data API v3
